exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your art collecting forward
items: Define your collection budget and establish spending limits for different price tiers
Research and identify 3-5 art movements or styles that align with your aesthetic preferences
Create a collection theme or curatorial focus to guide your acquisition decisions
Establish storage and display criteria before making your next art purchase
Set minimum and maximum size limits for artworks in your collection
Document the provenance and acquisition details for each artwork in your collection
